name: MMY: Otherworld Mystery
short_description: The mystery of the Otherworldly World MMX will open to You through rotation!
detailed_description:
The game takes place in a dark and mysterious world MM. Mr. X transformed in the game by overcoming obstacles and passing through a teleport with the help of the player.

Feature of game
  • Smooth and convenient control and rotation.
  • Ability to jump over obstacles.
  • Gloomy atmosphere and bright level design.
  • Many interesting quests.
  • Levers and switches.
  • Doors, keys and dangerous spikes.

Differences from the first part of MMX!?
  • The Game has 50 levels!
  • New smooth and fast controls, jump And new exciting levels!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Portuguese - Brazil, Hungarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese
